query:
You are a SaaS pricing analyst. For each of the 10 companies below, extract their CURRENT pricing structure from their public pricing pages ({domain}/pricing, {domain}/plans), G2, Capterra, and reverse-engineering posts.

Companies:
  1. name="Nalo", website="https://nalo.fr"
  2. name="Linxo", website="https://linxo.com"
  3. name="Grisbee", website="https://grisbee.com"
  4. name="Horiz.io", website="https://horiz.io"
  5. name="Sharesight", website="https://sharesight.com"
  6. name="InvMon", website="https://invmon.com"
  7. name="Wealthfolio", website="https://ealthfolio.app"
  8. name="Quicken", website="https://quicken.com"
  9. name="Merlin", website="https://merlin.com"
  10. name="Sure", website="https://sure.com"

For EACH company extract:
- pricing_model_kind: one of Freemium, Subscription, Usage-based, Enterprise, Hybrid
- free_plan: true/false
- starts_at_usd: lowest paid tier monthly USD (0 if free plan only, null if Enterprise-only / contact sales)
- mention: short UI tagline e.g. 'Starts at $20/user/mo' or 'Contact sales' or 'Free + paid plans from $8/mo'
- tiers: array of {name, price_monthly_usd, price_annual_usd, features (3-6 strings), target}. Include ALL public tiers (e.g. Free, Pro, Business, Enterprise). For Enterprise tiers without public price, set price_monthly_usd=null and target='Enterprise'.
- recent_changes: any pricing change in last 12 months (date + source). Leave blank if none.

Omit any field you cannot verify — do NOT invent prices. Return one object per company in the SAME order as the input list. Preserve company names EXACTLY.
answer:
## Executive Summary

This report extracts the current pricing structures for the requested financial SaaS and wealth management platforms based on available data. Verifiable pricing data was identified for four of the ten companies: **Nalo** (Usage-based), **Linxo** (Freemium), **Grisbee** (Freemium), and **Horiz.io** (Freemium). Pricing for these platforms is predominantly quoted in Euros (EUR) or structured around Assets Under Management (AUM) percentages rather than standard USD monthly SaaS tiers. No verifiable pricing data was found for the remaining six companies (Sharesight, InvMon, Wealthfolio, Quicken, Merlin, Sure).

## Detailed Analysis: Company Pricing Structures

Below is the extracted pricing data for each company, presented in the exact requested order. Fields that could not be verified from the provided data have been strictly omitted.

### 1. Nalo
* **pricing_model_kind**: Usage-based [Quels sont les frais de Nalo Patrimoine ?](https://content.nalo.fr/help/quels-sont-les-frais-de-nalo-patrimoine-nalo-faq)
* **free_plan**: false [Nalo 2026 : retour sur les performances et frais de gestion](https://onlineasset.com/avis-nalo/)
* **mention**: "Total annual fees range from 0.85% to 1.65%" [Quels sont les frais de Nalo Patrimoine ?](https://content.nalo.fr/help/quels-sont-les-frais-de-nalo-patrimoine-nalo-faq)
* **tiers**:
  * **name**: Plan Épargne Retraite (PER)
    * **features**: 
      * "1.6% total annual fee" [Frais PER 2026 : frais d’entrée, de gestion, de versement expliqués](https://blog.nalo.fr/frais-du-per/)
      * "Minimum initial and recurring investment of 50 €" [PER Nalo : Avis, Frais et Performances 2026](https://www.retraite.com/per/per-nalo)
      * "1.5% fee on annuity arrears and 0.75% on annuity outstanding" [PER Nalo : Avis, Frais et Performances 2026](https://www.retraite.com/per/per-nalo)
    * **target**: Retirement savings
  * **name**: Nalo Patrimoine (Assurance-vie)
    * **features**: 
      * "1.65% total annual fee" [Quels sont les frais de Nalo Patrimoine ?](https://content.nalo.fr/help/quels-sont-les-frais-de-nalo-patrimoine-nalo-faq)
      * "0.85% administrative management fee" [Quels sont les frais de Nalo Patrimoine ?](https://content.nalo.fr/help/quels-sont-les-frais-de-nalo-patrimoine-nalo-faq)
      * "0.55% Nalo mandate fee" [Quels sont les frais de Nalo Patrimoine ?](https://content.nalo.fr/help/quels-sont-les-frais-de-nalo-patrimoine-nalo-faq)
      * "0.25% internal ETF fees" [Quels sont les frais de Nalo Patrimoine ?](https://content.nalo.fr/help/quels-sont-les-frais-de-nalo-patrimoine-nalo-faq)
    * **target**: Life insurance and wealth management
* **recent_changes**: Promotional offers in 2026 include up to 12 months of management fees waived or up to 1,000 € in fees offered [Nalo 2026 : retour sur les performances et frais de gestion](https://onlineasset.com/avis-nalo/).

### 2. Linxo
* **pricing_model_kind**: Freemium [Linxo Lab - Linxo](https://www.linxo.com/nos-offres/premium)
* **free_plan**: true [Linxo Lab - Linxo](https://www.linxo.com/nos-offres/premium)
* **mention**: "Free version and Premium version available" [Linxo Lab - Linxo](https://www.linxo.com/nos-offres/premium)
* **tiers**:
  * **name**: Free
    * **features**: 
      * "Basic account consulting" [Linxo Lab - Linxo](https://www.linxo.com/nos-offres/premium)
      * "Expense tracking" [Linxo Lab - Linxo](https://www.linxo.com/nos-offres/premium)
    * **target**: Basic users
  * **name**: Premium
    * **features**: 
      * "Personalized categories for budget management" [Comment gérer son budget mensuel ? Linxo](https://linxo.com/gestion-budget-mensuel/)
      * "30-day balance forecast" [Linxo votre solution budgétaire du quotidien](https://linxo.com/linxo-app-historique/)
      * "Unlimited tracking of savings account balances" [Linxo votre solution budgétaire du quotidien](https://linxo.com/linxo-app-historique/)
      * "Detailed view of investments" [Linxo votre solution budgétaire du quotidien](https://linxo.com/linxo-app-historique/)
    * **target**: Advanced users
* **recent_changes**: Following the launch of Linxo Lab, existing Premium subscriptions remain valid and functional across both applications with no changes to features [Lancement de notre nouvelle application Linxo Lab](https://linxo.com/lancement-linxo-lab/), [Linxo votre solution budgétaire du quotidien](https://linxo.com/linxo-app-historique/).

### 3. Grisbee
* **pricing_model_kind**: Freemium [Tarifs et rémunérations - Grisbee | Grisbee - cabinet en gestion de patrimoine en ligne](https://www.grisbee.fr/tarifs/)
* **free_plan**: true [Tarifs et rémunérations - Grisbee | Grisbee - cabinet en gestion de patrimoine en ligne](https://www.grisbee.fr/tarifs/)
* **starts_at_usd**: 0 [Tarifs et rémunérations - Grisbee | Grisbee - cabinet en gestion de patrimoine en ligne](https://www.grisbee.fr/tarifs/)
* **mention**: "Free online wealth management tool" [Tarifs et rémunérations - Grisbee | Grisbee - cabinet en gestion de patrimoine en ligne](https://www.grisbee.fr/tarifs/)
* **tiers**:
  * **name**: Free
    * **price_monthly_usd**: 0
    * **price_annual_usd**: 0
    * **features**: 
      * "Account synchronization" [Tarifs et rémunérations - Grisbee | Grisbee - cabinet en gestion de patrimoine en ligne](https://www.grisbee.fr/tarifs/)
      * "Dedicated advisor without fees or commissions" [Tarifs et rémunérations - Grisbee | Grisbee - cabinet en gestion de patrimoine en ligne](https://www.grisbee.fr/tarifs/)
      * "Financial diagnostics (tax, retirement, inheritance)" [Tarifs et rémunérations - Grisbee | Grisbee - cabinet en gestion de patrimoine en ligne](https://www.grisbee.fr/tarifs/)
      * "Alerts, notifications, and simulations" [Tarifs et rémunérations - Grisbee | Grisbee - cabinet en gestion de patrimoine en ligne](https://www.grisbee.fr/tarifs/)
    * **target**: All users

### 4. Horiz.io
* **pricing_model_kind**: Freemium [Les meilleurs logiciels pour les agents immobiliers en 2026 | Horiz.io](https://horiz.io/investissement-immobilier/meilleurs-logiciels-agents-immobiliers)
* **free_plan**: true [Les meilleurs logiciels pour les agents immobiliers en 2026 | Horiz.io](https://horiz.io/investissement-immobilier/meilleurs-logiciels-agents-immobiliers)
* **mention**: "Starts at 99 € per year (8.25 €/month)" [Plateforme de gestion locative en 2026 : pourquoi Horiz.io ? | Horiz.io](https://horiz.io/gestion-immobiliere/plateforme-de-gestion-locative-en-2022-pourquoi-horiz-io)
* **tiers**:
  * **name**: Free
    * **features**: 
      * "Estimate the value of any real estate property" [Les meilleurs logiciels pour les agents immobiliers en 2026 | Horiz.io](https://horiz.io/investissement-immobilier/meilleurs-logiciels-agents-immobiliers)
      * "Post real estate advertisements for free" [Déposer une annonce immobilière gratuite sur Horiz : comment faire ? | Horiz.io](https://horiz.io/investissement-immobilier/deposer-une-annonce-immobiliere-gratuite-sur-horiz-comment-faire)
    * **target**: Basic users
  * **name**: Pro / Annual Subscription
    * **features**: 
      * "Management for up to 50 properties" [Plateforme de gestion locative en 2026 : pourquoi Horiz.io ? | Horiz.io](https://horiz.io/gestion-immobiliere/plateforme-de-gestion-locative-en-2022-pourquoi-horiz-io)
      * "Modify or reactivate real estate advertisements" [Déposer une annonce immobilière gratuite sur Horiz : comment faire ? | Horiz.io](https://horiz.io/investissement-immobilier/deposer-une-annonce-immobiliere-gratuite-sur-horiz-comment-faire)
      * "Advanced data including cadastre, price evolution, and building permits" [Les meilleurs logiciels pour les agents immobiliers en 2026 | Horiz.io](https://horiz.io/investissement-immobilier/meilleurs-logiciels-agents-immobiliers)
    * **target**: Professionals and Landlords

### 5. Sharesight
*(Omitted — No verifiable pricing data present in findings)*

### 6. InvMon
*(Omitted — No verifiable pricing data present in findings)*

### 7. Wealthfolio
*(Omitted — No verifiable pricing data present in findings)*

---

## Gaps and Limitations
1. **Missing Companies**: No research findings were provided for Sharesight, InvMon, Wealthfolio, Quicken, Merlin, or Sure. Consequently, their pricing objects have been entirely omitted to prevent hallucination.
2. **Currency Limitations**: The provided data for Nalo, Linxo, and Horiz.io only references Euros (EUR) or percentage-based AUM fees. Because no USD conversion rates or explicit USD tiers were provided in the source material, the `starts_at_usd`, `price_monthly_usd`, and `price_annual_usd` fields had to be omitted for these companies.
3. **Missing Tier Prices**: The exact fiat price for Linxo's Premium tier was not present in the findings and has been omitted.
